docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, B.D. AS TO DEFENDANT AUSTIN, WALLACE JOHNSON, LISA AKA THARISSA JOHNSON &LORISA JOHNSON DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT AUSTIN, WALLACE JOHNSON, LISA AKA THARISSA JOHNSON &LORISA JOHNSON ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT AUSTIN, WALLACE JOHNSON, LISA AKA THARISSA JOHNSON &LORISA JOHNSON ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT AUSTIN, WALLACE JOHNSON, LISA AKA THARISSA JOHNSON &LORISA JOHNSON ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT AUSTIN, WALLACE JOHNSON, LISA AKA THARISSA JOHNSON &LORISA JOHNSON
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT AUSTIN, WALLACE
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, B.D. SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-01-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-25-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON AUG-01-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
DEFTS LATE AT SETTL CONF, JURY DEMAND STRICKEN PER DEPT 1.
#1 MASON/NORMAN: C/C FOR CT TRIAL. ATTY D MENDEZ APP FOR PLTF. DEFTS W AUSTIN & L JOHNSON PRESENT IN PRO PER. SETTLED ON RECORD. JDMT BY STIP FOR PLTF AGAINST BOTH DEFTS. PLTF TO PREPARE JDMT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUSTIN, WALLACE JOHNSON, LISA AKA THARISSA JOHNSON &LORISA JOHNSON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 S VAN NESS #337 $2,086.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,086.00, STAYED UNTIL AUG-12-1995, NOON. IF DEFTS VACATE ON TIME, PLTF WILL FILE SATISFACTION OF JDMT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
